changes: Added explicit instruction to use curl with wttr.in and never use web_search — model was wasting steps on web_search which lacks API key
Removed JSON output format section to prevent unnecessary extra API calls that consumed context
Added instruction to use one-line format by default and avoid extra JSON calls
Added detailed comparison presentation guidelines: require markdown table and explicit temperature difference calculation
Added specific travel/packing advice template: item-level packing list organized by city, every item must reference weather data (temperature, wind, humidity)
Streamlined format codes and notes sections
